scope_compliance: This side packet only writes under D:\__MY APPS\Unity Doom\Documentation\Planning\V0_1_33_LevelDensityBatch\.
batch_goal: Produce a visible five-level density leap in one compile by layering route-dressing families at objectives, locks, hazards, secrets, combat landmarks, and transitions without changing gameplay authority.

baseline.route_audit_v0_1_32: No route-blocking scene composition issues found by deterministic audit.

one_compile_visible_leap.strategy: Layer multiple families per route beat rather than promoting isolated props.
must_be_visible_at_runtime: Each level has at least one hero threshold stack.
Critical locks and objectives have amber/red/green route-state support.
Pipe arteries visually connect objectives to locks and exits.
Hazard and combat arenas gain readable edge language.
Secrets use consistent optional clue motifs.

route_dressing_families.name: Threshold Landmark Frames
route_dressing_families.gameplay_intent: Make gates, lifts, hoists, and boss exits read as major route state machines before interaction.
route_dressing_families.visible_density_contribution: Big silhouette frames, piston braces, sill plates, cable drums, side-wall mass.
route_safety_risks: crowding spawn or exit comfort space
validation_gates: No colliders or gameplay authority under dressing roots.
Center aperture remains visually clear.
First-person screenshot confirms lock or exit is readable.
No dressing root is inside transition volumes.

route_dressing_families.name: Pressure Pipe Arteries
route_dressing_families.gameplay_intent: Visually explain that pressure moves from objective to lock to exit.
route_dressing_families.visible_density_contribution: Copper and blackened pipe runs, clamp collars, feed or return labels, short overhead bundles.
validation_gates: Pipe runs are wall or ceiling bound.
No route lane below 2.2m wide is reduced.
Color and state match objective progression.

route_dressing_families.name: Objective Machine Constellations
route_dressing_families.gameplay_intent: Make keys, valves, regulators, weapon displays, and Warden locks feel like mechanical systems.
route_dressing_families.visible_density_contribution: Gauge banks, control plates, nameplates, wheel frames, plinth crowns, status bulbs.
validation_gates: Prompt or pickup remains visible from approach.
No extra interactables are introduced.
Metadata marks support objects visual-only.

route_dressing_families.name: Route-State Signal Chains
route_dressing_families.gameplay_intent: Teach amber objective, red locked or unsafe, and green restored or exit language repeatedly across the run.
route_dressing_families.visible_density_contribution: Amber enamel plates, red lock lamps, green exit lamps, small repeating signal beads.
route_safety_risks: conflicting with existing red or green state
validation_gates: Color audit per level.
Amber does not mark final exit.
Green is reserved for restored route, safe, or exit state.
No new dynamic lights unless accepted by the main lane.

route_dressing_families.name: Safe-Lane Floor Grammar
route_dressing_families.gameplay_intent: Show where the player can stand, turn, retreat, and board lifts without reading UI text.
route_dressing_families.visible_density_contribution: Flush brass strips, blackened kick plates, heat-safe edge bands, worn traffic paths.
validation_gates: Trim height target stays at or below 0.03m.
No colliders.
Hazard-edge markings match actual damage zones.
Lift or hoist boarding areas preserve planned comfort space.

route_dressing_families.name: Secret Clue Motifs
route_dressing_families.gameplay_intent: Make optional caches discoverable through a consistent language across Level01, Level02, Level04, and future Level05.
route_dressing_families.visible_density_contribution: Chalk marks, missing rivets, cold pipe labels, coal dust trails, clerk misfile labels.
route_safety_risks: pulling players off critical route during combat
validation_gates: Secret clue appears outside active combat or hazard lane.
Main route signage remains stronger than secret clue.
Secret reward remains visible after entry.

route_dressing_families.name: Combat Read Cover Dressing
route_dressing_families.gameplay_intent: Make cover and arena edges look intentional while preserving enemy movement and player escape routes.
route_dressing_families.visible_density_contribution: Skins on existing benches, pipe elbows, regulator pylons, tool racks, broken cradle frames.
validation_gates: Visual-only unless attached to existing collision.
Enemy approach and projectile lanes remain readable.
Boss pylons do not trivialize line-of-sight.

route_dressing_families.name: Hazard Tell Amplifiers
route_dressing_families.gameplay_intent: Make steam and furnace hazards readable before damage and after shutdown.
route_dressing_families.visible_density_contribution: Warning collars, heat shields, damper plates, safe-state relief lamps, steam baffle frames.
route_safety_risks: implying inactive hazards are safe too early
validation_gates: Warning cue visible before hazard.
Shutdown or vented state differs from active.
No dressing placed inside damage ownership volumes.

route_dressing_families.name: Skyline Machinery Mass
route_dressing_families.gameplay_intent: Add large background mechanical identity without changing route geometry.
route_dressing_families.visible_density_contribution: High wall gantries, rotating silhouettes, governor drums, hammer presses, distant pipe racks.
validation_gates: Static or cheap motion only.
Collision disabled.
Visible from route but not mistaken for traversal.
Quality downshift can simplify detail.

route_dressing_families.name: Local Crew Evidence
route_dressing_families.gameplay_intent: Add story density that makes each space feel worked-in and abandoned under pressure.
route_dressing_families.visible_density_contribution: Tool trays, work orders, failed repair plates, soot trails, plaque staging, maintenance clutter.
route_safety_risks: drawing attention away from objective text
validation_gates: Floor clutter stays outside main lanes.
Pickups and plaques remain unobstructed.
No small objects in first combat retreat paths.

Level01.name: Brassworks Intake
Level01.headline_intent: Teach movement, key, pressure gate, route state color, service lift, and first secret language through a dense but safe service-entrance pass.
Level01.hero_anchor_stack: Gate Overlook and Pressure Gate, x -16..8, z -4..7, plus Service Lift x -3..7, z 18..24.

zones.zone: Soot Service Entry to Maintenance Throat
zones.gameplay_intent: Establish forward pressure-pipe pull and amber breadcrumbing before combat.
route_safety_risks: route looks narrower than actual geometry
validation_gates: Main path identifiable within 3 seconds from spawn.
No trim or cable narrows the throat.

zones.coordinates: x -18..6, z -18..-6; first Scrapper near x -10, z -11
zones.gameplay_intent: Make first cover and workbench space readable without cornering the player.
validation_gates: Two side routes around bench dressing remain visible.
First combat still avoids spawn-behind pressure.

zones.gameplay_intent: Make locked route, key need, and restored pressure state clear.
validation_gates: Locked gate screenshot shows red state and key branch.
Open-state screenshot shows green route/lift continuation.

zones.coordinates: x 8..24, z -8..6; dormant Scrapper near x 18, z -1
zones.gameplay_intent: Crown the key plinth and make the branch feel mechanically purposeful.
validation_gates: Gear key remains visible from approach.
Acquisition VFX remains unobstructed.

zones.gameplay_intent: Introduce optional secret clue grammar.
validation_gates: Secret looks optional.
Reward pickup line clear once inside.

zones.zone: Furnace Control Room and Service Lift
zones.gameplay_intent: Make the exit-side fight and lift feel like the first pressure restoration success.
validation_gates: Preserve 4m lift turning space where planned.
Green lift language visible after gate.

Level01.targeted_smoke: Spawn to key, gate, lift, and intake secret clue.

Level02.name: Pipeworks Annex
Level02.headline_intent: Make the locked Boilerheart lift, west routing valve, east ranged pressure, and green return route read as one pipe-routing system.

zones.gameplay_intent: Pull north through alternating cover rhythm.
validation_gates: Baffle pass keeps side-step lanes.
Melee fallback remains readable.

zones.gameplay_intent: Make optional resources feel like a real pump room.
route_safety_risks: branch appears to be critical objective path
validation_gates: Amber objective chain remains stronger toward valve/lobby.
Pickups remain visible.

zones.gameplay_intent: Use cold pipe and chalk language for optional cache discovery.
route_safety_risks: clue too close to critical valve
validation_gates: Clue readable from baffle side.

zones.zone: Condensate Spine and Lancer Pipe Bridge
zones.coordinates: Spine x -12..14, z -8..8; Bridge x 8..30, z 2..18; Lancer x 18, z 9, Y +1.2m
zones.gameplay_intent: Add pipe-wall density while preserving first Lancer read and cover options.
validation_gates: First Lancer visible from spine.
Cover elbows remain readable.

zones.gameplay_intent: Make valve completion visibly route pressure back to the lift.
validation_gates: Valve prompt readable at approach.
Green pressure return path appears after completion.

zones.zone: Locked Lift Lobby and Boilerheart Lift
zones.gameplay_intent: Make locked then restored lift state obvious.
validation_gates: Locked-lift rejection readable.
Lift identified within 5 seconds from lobby after valve.

Level02.targeted_smoke: Locked lift, valve, restored return, first Lancer read, cartridge cache clue.

Level03.name: Boilerheart Core
Level03.headline_intent: Make the Boilerheart a circular pressure system: steam approach, central boiler, scattergun, Bellows Node, pressure valve, and foundry lift.
Level03.hero_anchor_stack: Boilerheart Ring x -22..22, z -10..14 plus Pressure Valve Catwalk x -20..20, z 16..28 and Foundry Lift x -8..10, z 28..36.

zones.gameplay_intent: Teach steam rhythm through safe-lane strips and warning frames.
validation_gates: Warning visible before damage zones.
Safe lane matches passable route.

zones.gameplay_intent: Add pressure-gauge lore and future secret motif.
validation_gates: Main route to ring remains stronger.
Plaque and pickups unobstructed.

zones.gameplay_intent: Make alternate loop read as safe repositioning.
validation_gates: Comfortable lateral movement preserved.
Loop exit readable.

zones.gameplay_intent: Create central landmark and readable circular cover.
validation_gates: Boiler landmark, scattergun side, and lift/catwalk direction visible from entry.

zones.gameplay_intent: Make the weapon display valuable and readable before foundry escalation.
validation_gates: Weapon silhouette and acquisition burst visible.
No dressing in pickup route automation.

zones.coordinates: x -34..-12, z 2..18; needs about 16m x 16m open dodge space
zones.gameplay_intent: Amplify support-machine priority and pulse-safe edges.
validation_gates: Dodge space retained.
Pulse warning circle visible from entry.

zones.zone: Pressure Valve Catwalk and Foundry Lift
zones.gameplay_intent: Make venting visibly release pressure and restore the foundry lift.
validation_gates: Valve interaction readable.
Vented state differs from active.
Foundry lift route clear after valve.

Level03.targeted_smoke: Steam approach, scattergun pickup, Bellows Node chamber, valve vent, foundry lift.

Level04.headline_intent: Make the foundry the heat-and-heavy-combat showcase with clear hazard lanes, Bulwark staging, coal cache clues, regulator density, and hoist clarity.
Level04.hero_anchor_stack: Furnace Row x -34..34, z -2..20 plus Cooling Regulator x -18..18, z 20..32 and Emergency Hoist x -6..8, z 32..40.

zones.coordinates: Arrival x -8..10, z -36..-26; Quench candidate x -12..6, z -18..-8

validation_gates: Furnace row glow and forward route visible from arrival.

zones.zone: Foundry Gantry and Slag Side Loop
zones.gameplay_intent: Show alternate movement choices and hazard preview.
validation_gates: Two routes into Furnace Row remain visible.
No rail-less narrow fighting cues.

zones.gameplay_intent: Make heat pulses, safe lateral movement, and cover rhythm immediately readable.
route_safety_risks: enemy movement hidden by glow or heat shimmer

zones.gameplay_intent: Use coal dust, cooler pipe, and stuck panel language for optional discovery.

zones.gameplay_intent: Stage the Bulwark with broken rescue frames and hammer bay scale.
validation_gates: Bulwark windup visible at eye level.

zones.gameplay_intent: Connect regulator and emergency hoist through red/orange pressure and green exit language.

Level05.name: Governor Core
Level05.headline_intent: Make the finale a cathedral-scale pressure bureaucracy with ordered approach, regulator arms, readable Warden arena, and final hoist unlock clarity.
Level05.hero_anchor_stack: Governor Warden Arena x -24..24, z 4..30 plus Master Override Hoist x -8..8, z 30..40.

zones.gameplay_intent: Make Master Governor logic bank the central orientation read before Warden.

route_safety_risks: secret clue competes during boss approach

zones.gameplay_intent: Give mirrored arm a distinct pressure identity and support Lancer placement.
validation_gates: East/west labels and silhouette differences readable from Core Ring.

zones.coordinates: x -24..24, z 4..30; Warden center x 0, z 17; cover pylons spaced at least 8m apart
zones.gameplay_intent: Clarify boss attack lanes, cover pylons, hostile feeds, and shutdown release.

Boss HUD readability unaffected.

zones.gameplay_intent: Make final locked hoist unmistakable before and after Warden defeat.
route_safety_risks: hoist too close to boss combat footprint
validation_gates: Locked hoist rejection readable before fight.
Green unlock visible after Warden death.
No dressing inside final exit trigger.

Level05.targeted_smoke: Core Ring orientation, side arms, Warden fight, locked and unlocked final hoist.

cross_level_rules: Place density at route decisions, not evenly everywhere.
Keep every dressing root visual-only unless the main lane explicitly attaches it to existing collision.
Preserve existing route triggers, pickup authority, valve authority, hazards, Warden lock, final win, enemy placements, and objective text.
Do not place decorative roots inside transition, pickup, hazard, enemy spawn, boss, or prompt ownership volumes.
Amber means attention or objective direction; red means locked, hostile, or unsafe; green means restored, safe, or exit.
Floor pieces must be flush or near-flush and carry no gameplay collision.
Combat dressing should frame enemies rather than sit behind their silhouettes in the same value or color range.
Hazard warning dressing should amplify existing tells, not replace them.
Secret clue density should be weaker than main route signage but consistent enough for repeatable discovery.
Preserve turning space near lifts and hoists for future VR comfort.
batch_validation_gates: Generated scene rebuild for Level01 through Level05.
Batch validator confirms every level has at least one hero anchor stack and no level receives only grime or story clutter.
Family validator confirms expected roots, metadata, material roles, named child groups, and zero unauthorized colliders or gameplay components.
Route-state color audit confirms amber/red/green usage matches current objective, lock, and hazard state.
Transition safety check confirms no dressing root sits inside lift, hoist, gate, final exit, or level transition volumes.
Pickup/prompt visibility check confirms gear key, routing valve, Boilerheart valve, scattergun pickup, regulator if present, Warden lock, plaques, health/ammo, and final hoist remain readable.
Hazard readability check confirms steam/furnace VFX and warning timings are not masked by dressing.
Combat readability check confirms first Scrapper, first Lancer, Bellows Node, Bulwark, and Warden silhouettes remain clear from intended approach angles.
Targeted route smoke passes for Level01 through Level05.
First-person screenshot review from spawn, objective approach, and exit approach for each level.
Full V0 matrix passes after targeted checks are clean.

targeted_route_smokes.Level01: Spawn to key, gate, lift, and intake secret clue.
targeted_route_smokes.Level02: Locked lift, valve, restored return, first Lancer read, cartridge cache clue.
targeted_route_smokes.Level03: Steam approach, scattergun pickup, Bellows Node chamber, valve vent, foundry lift.
targeted_route_smokes.Level04: Heat pulse lanes, coal cache approach, Bulwark Hammer Bay, emergency hoist.
targeted_route_smokes.Level05: Core Ring orientation, side arms, Warden fight, locked and unlocked final hoist.

recommended_next_compile_shape: Level01: pressure gate and service lift become the tutorial standard for state language.
Level02: pipe arteries visibly connect routing valve to Boilerheart lift.
Level03: Boilerheart Ring, scattergun, Bellows Node, valve, and foundry lift become one circular pressure system.
Level04: furnace hazards and Bulwark staging read as one foundry showcase.
Level05: Warden lock and final hoist become the route finale, with ordered regulator arms and strong boss readability.
